reviews.title: $1 sound
reviews.text: I paid $12.48 with coupon for these. They are worse than I expected. $1 sound quality. Instructions useless. Anyone standing next to you can hear what you are listening to you. Actually, the sound quality is better not wearing them vs wearing them. Sounds better hanging off my neck than around my ears.

reviews.title: Comfort and Ease of Use
reviews.text: These may be the perfect tips for IEMs. I like these way more than the silicone tips. They are easy to put in and don't bother my ears. I haven't had them long so I can't speak to their durability yet. I'll come back to this review later if I have any issues.

reviews.title: Big improvement over OEM.
reviews.text: I purchased these memory foam tips to use in place of the OEM tips on my KS Z10 Pro IEMs. The seal is drastically better as these cut out almost all external sound and let you focus purely on your music. Excellent purchase.

It can be used together or individually for up to 6hrs of playing music and the case offers up to a 36hrs of charge allowing you to easily charge it multiple times before having to charge the case again. It easily fits even the smaller ear canals with 3 different sized tips. They stay comfortable in your ear no matter how long you use them. Easy hands free pairing via Bluetooth. Very easy to use and control volume or make calls or use siri voice. It has a shocking deep bass for better sound quality

features: WIRELESS EARPHONES FOR TV FOR HARD OF HEARING W/ TV AUDIO LISTENING ASSISTANCE - Voice clarity and noise reduction tech reduces distracting background noises and makes you hear each word spoken on your favorite show with full intelligibility. You can select STEREO on the transmitter to enjoy Hi-fi music or MONO to enjoy clearer TV conversations.

UNIQUE 3 IN 1 DESIGN TV HEADPHONES FOR FULL CONVENIENCE, ERGONOMIC NECKBAND & SOFT EARBUDS & SPARE BATTERY FOR LASTING TV ENJOYMENT - Transmitter, charging base and headset stand 3-in-1 design for your full convenience. The ergonomic neckband design and ultra-soft ear tips bring you an easy and comfortable TV viewing experience.

title: AGVEE 32Bit 384Khz USB-C to 3.5mm Headphone Adapter, Type-C Aux Jack Earbuds Splitter, USBC Audio Earphones Dongle, PD 30W Charging Converter for Samsung S21 S20, Note 20 10, Pixel 2 3 4 5, Black
description:
⭕[SUPPORT PD & QC FAST CHARGING]
This is an upgraded version that supports PD and QC charging protocols. Maximum power is 9V*2A=18W.
⭕[HIGH CONFIGURATION CHIP]
Built-in Realtek advanced digital audio processing chip, 32-bit stereo audio DAC, 384K sampling rate, active noise reduction, gives you Hi-res sound performance. Conversion distortion is less than 1%. You can use a not particularly bad earbuds for a simple comparison test.
⭕[CLEAR AUDIO MUSIC & CALLING]
High Resolution Audio by DAC is pure without any unpleasant bottom noise. With a higher dynamic range and 120dB Signal Noise Ratio, it can ensure good resolution in both low-frequency and high-frequency, and accurately reproduce all details in music. Good high frequency extension performance. The medium frequency is clean and full, with flexibility and strength, the voice is friendly and natural. The low frequency is thick and heavy, giving you a powerful pleasure.
⭕[COMPATIBLE WITH]
This 2-in-1 USB C to 3.5mm Aux Headphone Charging Adapter is specailly designed for USB-C phones without 3.5mm audio port, you can listen to music with 3.5mm earbuds and fast charging at the same time. Support remote control and low noise calls. It's a little tight for iPad Pro.

features: 💓[HUMANIZED UPGRADE] You can connect the phone, headphones and charge cable together in any order, You do not have to connect in order.

🚀[HIGH FIDELITY OUTPUT]High-Excursion drivers that allow for greater dynamic range, improved bass, and lower distortion. Signal Noise Ratio (SNR) 120dB. Total Harmonic Distortion (THD) 90dB. Professional class G headphone output. Active noise cancellation (ANC) feature. Support 44.1k-384k/32bit full frequency sampling. So many excellent parameters ensure an immersive & vivid gaming & music experience.

🌱[HI-RES SOUND] The Hi-Res certified DAC converter provides high-resolution audio, which can express the ultimate quality of music and the reproduction of the original sound, and get the real feeling of the original singer or performer in the live performance. Very suitable for HIFI earbuds. Because the chip is ultra-low power, compared to those with high power consumption, it can effectively extend the phone battery life without worrying about battery overload.

🚩[KEY UPDATES & FAST CHARGING] [1]-Support PD & QC Fast Charing. [2]-Seamless USB C male connector, ensure better anti-interference transmission. [3]-The Latest High Speed and High Resolution Decoding Chip. Support Maximum Power 18W(9V*2A), compatible with PD & QC charging protocol. Cannot be used for data transfer. Support remote control and low noise calls. (Volume +/- of original Apple 3.5mm earpods is not supported.)

⭕[COMPATIBLE WITH] The following device are recommended: For iPad Pro (2020, 2018) 12.9 & 11 & iPad Air 2020; For Samsung Galaxy S21 S20(Ultra, FE 5G), Note 20 10(Ultra), Z Filp, Z Fold 2, A80, Tab S5e/S6; For Google Pixel 2/2XL/3/3XL/3A/3A XL/4/4XL/5/6/6 Pro, Essential Phone. For GoPro Hero 9 8 7. Due to the inconsistency of the type-c protocol of each device brand, the unlisted device are not recommended, there may be incompatibility.

reviews.title: Very well made.
reviews.text: I ordered the Impeto RCA Cable to replace stock cables that were included with my turntable. These are extremely durable and look high quality. The sound seems crisper and they are a nice touch to my audio setup without breaking the bank. I am pleasantly surprised and would highly recommend if you are in the market for some RCA cables. I am definitely going to order more when I add to my stereo.

reviews.title: Over-the-top quality
reviews.text: We are using these to connect a cheap record player to better speakers. To be honest, this cable feels like overkill for what we need. Such a solid premium feel! The braided cable is substantial. The connectors are copper, high quality, and fit snugly. If you don't mind the price, these are very nice cables.

reviews.title: Good sound and battery life, touch activated button bad
reviews.text: Overall, this is a good earbud. However, if you hold it in your hand you run the risk of your skin/touch activating the voice commands, it hears a random snippet of what you’re saying and it calls someone from your address book that kinda sorta sounds like what you had said and you have to quickly try to hang up as your phone dials someone you haven’t talked to in 5 years, you whispering “oh f*** nononono” over and over until it hangs up and you pray it didn’t actually connect on their side but it does every damn time and then you’re forced into a conversation of pleasantries. So like...yeah it works well, good range but the touch activated button was a big no from me.

reviews.title: I'm not keen on the cover material
reviews.text:
While the Arae Electronic Organizer does what it says, its implementation isn't great.

The double layers of this product has one and a half flap of elastic bands to hold bundled up wires, that's 18 spots total. The rest are two large pockets and a small pocket. That's plenty of room to carry most charging accessories that you'd have with you if you were equipped with tablets and phones. For laptops and cameras, you'll need other solutions. Even action camera chargers may have a hard time fitting in this slim product.

It's not a problem that this thing is pretty much made out of nylon from the outside in but the material that makes up the exterior of this product makes it look cheap. It's a rough, synthetic material that just makes it a bit cheap looking. I think cloth or leather would have been a better choice.

In addition, the zipper sticks, making it hard to quickly open this up to retrieve your wires for charging.

reviews.title: Case closed
reviews.text:
It's pretty amazing how much this will hold and still close up properly. I am using it for many cables and some adapters, and I am also keeping those little instruction manuals that come with everything in one of the zipper pouches. You can keep a lot of cables and adapters in this, and it will still zip up and be small enough for travel.
I like this case a lot.

reviews.title: Smaller than expected
reviews.text: Water proof? Not going to try that. This is super slim so you can't really fit a whole lot in. Wires, maybe... but devices, like portable routers, not exactly. Slim portable chargers, sure. Higher capacity batteries, nope. Won't fit anything more than two iPhones thick.

reviews.title: No More Ziplock Bags
reviews.text: This is such a better alternative to tossing cables into a ziplock bag.  The nice bag with zipper allows me to keep everything in one place.  I wished the compartments were a little wider, but it's easy to just use two compartments. Nice quality bag, once I get spares I would just pack these with a spare ready and be ready to go anytime.  Nice organization addition to my travel gear.

reviews.title: Handy little case
reviews.text: Does a good job at cutting down on cable clutter. I took a black Sharpie and identified the various cords by writing abbreviations on the cloth stretch band that secures the cords. It also helps organize miscellaneous adapters and charging units. Not sure how long it will last but for organizing cords and small electronic items it’s a good buy.

reviews.title: Uncomfortable
reviews.text: Got these for testing. They did break after a couple of years of use. They are also very uncomfortable. The headband is not a great design. However they do what they are intended to do.

reviews.title: Work well for online meetings
reviews.text: My school district is purchasing a set of 50 for my yearbook classroom where my science students spend a fair amount of time.  This one was purchased to try out at home.  Sound quality is good and mic quality isn't bad, either.  After wearing them for an hour, my ears really need a break, though - but I have a pretty big head; these should be more comfortable for my middle schoolers.  I wish they came with a blue accent as an option, though.  The ones at school will have the green accents.

reviews.title: Look at the shape of the earphones
reviews.text: The shape of the earphones is odd.  They don't cover thd entire ear which makes the a littke uncomfortable.

reviews.title: Head set good for Zoom
reviews.text: we like them.  However we have to separate for Zoom or we get override.  Otherwise it is good.

reviews.title: Gets the job done!
reviews.text: Decent headphone/Mic combo. Not the best (no volume control), but it's great for the price! I use it for my podcast and for gaming/twitch streaming, and it works out fine!
